events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment complete — the foam substitution is a code violation.

**Decision: fail** (risk: high). Standard spray foam was used at a penetration where IRC R302.11 requires an approved fireblocking material or a listed fire-rated sealant/firestop system — the mismatch was identifiable by the product's color/label. Since the work is only rough-complete and not yet closed in, the fix (remove the foam, install the correct listed fire-rated sealant or approved fireblocking material, then re-inspect) should happen now before drywall/cladding closeout. Full findings, corrective actions, and rationale are written to `/app/answer.json`.
